articles.title: Russia’s Largest Bank Announces Compatibility With Ethereum, Integrates MetaMask
articles.description: The largest bank in Russia, Sber, has announced that its proprietary blockchain platform will be compatible with Ethereum. In a press release, the bank, whose majority shareholder is the Russian government with a “50% + 1 share” option, announced the new capabilities for its proprietary open blockchain platform. The announcement was made during the first […]

articles.title: Did SBF Admit to Fraud Over Speculation of Mishandling Users’ Funds?
articles.description: Details remain unclear, but Sam Bankman-Fried (SBF) may have unintentionally admitted to fraud during a recent live Twitter space. Now, a 'whistleblower' is claiming to know more about FTX and Alameda Research were manipulating the market.

articles.title: Mike Novogratz: Bankman-Fried is ‘delusional’ and headed to jail
articles.description: The Galaxy Digital CEO alleges Sam Bankman-Fried and his cohorts perpetuated fraud and suggested they should be in jail.

articles.title: Sam Bankman-Fried says not aware of any improper use of funds in FTX downfall
articles.description: Sam Bankman-Fried, founder of failed cryptocurrency exchange FTX, said he did not know of any improper use of customer funds at his company, in an interview with ABC News.

articles.title: Ankr confirms exploit, asks for immediate trading halt
articles.description: The decentralized-finance protocol said it is working with exchanges to immediately halt trading of its BNB staking rewards token, aBNBc.
